comment: Configuration for the `licensee` license-detection gem (https://github.com/licensee/licensee). Multipaste is licensed under PolyForm Strict 1.0.0, which is NOT on the SPDX standard list, so we declare it via the SPDX `LicenseRef-` convention. The licensee tool will recognize `LicenseRef-PolyForm-Strict-1.0.0` from this file and stop trying to guess against the SPDX standard list.
